BiomeDef.label: national preserve
BiomeDef.description: Protected conifer forests and cold upland woodland. Despite harsh winters, these preserves still support reliable summer grazing and game.

BiomeDef.label: cranberry bog
BiomeDef.description: Dark, wet bogland choked by sulfur haze, fungal growth, and sodden ground. The old world lingers here in poisoned water and dim red growth.

BiomeDef.label: crater
BiomeDef.description: A blasted impact zone where cities and roads were torn apart. Craters seed the ruin and wasteland belts that spread around them.

BiomeDef.label: malpais
BiomeDef.description: Broken volcanic badlands of ash, clinker, and scorched soil. Heat and unstable ground still dominate these cursed fields.
